message:
refactor(history): drop redundant pre-overwrite fs::remove_file

In restore_backup's overwrite path we were calling fs::remove_file on
target_path right before commit_restored_target_with_rollback, which
already performs the atomic replace. The extra remove_file was a pre-
flight that added nothing on platforms where rename-over-existing is
supported, and on platforms where it isn't (Windows pre-NT) our commit
helper handles it with its own rollback-aware path.

Net: 5 lines removed, same observable behavior, one fewer non-atomic
filesystem state between rollback_guard capture and commit.
